title: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from EVA FIX Abnormals in Dairy Life
display_title: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from EVA FIX Abnormals in Dairy Life
wikitext:
[]: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from "EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life"             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Wed Nov 10, 2021 3:55 pm I present to you a bunch of illustrations from an obscure, apparently "unofficial" artbook titled Eva Fix: Abnormals in Dairy Life [sic] (alternatively subtitled Abnormalities in Daily Life by some fans out there); these illustrations depict concept art for alternate versions of Evangelions 05 through 13 that come with their own original pilots. I've tried my best to translate the pilot's names and their countries of origin (because surprise, none of them are Japanese... well, except possibly one, who might be part-Japanese based on their given name), which are included as comments above each image, but be advised that some have defied my attempts at deducing what they're supposed to stand for. I leave it up to those members with far better grasp on Japanese-to-English translation to decipher the information contained within the walls of text; maybe then we can update the wiki's Extracanonical Characters article with the characters' info. 6th Children  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from "EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life"             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Nov 14, 2021 9:36 am Wooow is sou good.

[]: Re: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from "EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life"             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Mon Nov 15, 2021 2:58 am IKR? I wish I could fluently read Japanese so that I could understand all that's written in these illustrations. There's so much lore in this that we're missing out on.

[]: Re: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from "EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life"             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Nov 16, 2021 1:50 pm Yeah, this is 100% fanmade, just an elaborate doujin. As for what you're missing out on; I've spoken to a few people about this years ago who weren't fluent by any stretch, but spoke enough Japanese to understand the broad strokes; if memory at all serves me, the throughline was that all of the story to this is just comical amounts of edge with little to no actual substance

[]: Re: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from "EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life"             Quote Post by cyharding » Tue Nov 16, 2021 11:01 pm Question: Based on the title, can we expect images of cows, and if so, are the Holsteins or Jerseys?

[]: Re: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from "EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life"             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Wed Nov 17, 2021 11:13 am Blockio wrote: Yeah, this is 100% fanmade, just an elaborate doujin.

[]: Re: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from "EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life"             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Nov 17, 2021 2:26 pm MarqFJA87 wrote: How are you so certain?

[]: Re: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from "EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life"             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Wed Nov 17, 2021 3:00 pm Oh man EVA 08 and 13 have such sick designs, 08 looks like if Jet Alone's design was adapted to work as an Evangelion, 13 looks almost like a proto Mk.07 with it's round, basic head.

[]: Re: Pilot and Evangelion concept illustrations from "EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life"             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Wed Nov 17, 2021 4:40 pm Blockio wrote: Because if it were official, it would have the appropriate branding on it. No gainax or khara logo anywhere on the thing.
